history.content:
<thought>
I am at row 7, column D, facing north. The cell directly ahead (row 6, column D) is safe floor. The goal is at row 5, column E. I can reach it by moving forward twice (to row 5, column D) and then turning right once to face east and moving forward once to the goal. So my next step is to move forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The agent is at (7, D) facing up. The cell directly ahead (6, D) is floor ('.'), while the cell to the right (7, E) is lava ('L') and to the left (7, C) is wall ('#'). The goal is at (6, F) two cells to the east. Moving forward is safe and brings us closer to the goal. After moving, we can turn right to head east towards the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The agent is facing north at row 7, column D. The goal is at column F, two cells to the east. The cell directly east (column E) is floor, so I should turn right to face east and then move forward.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
The goal is directly ahead at row 05 column D, two steps forward. The cell in front (row 06 column D) is floor, so I can move forward safely.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The goal is directly in front of me at cell (6, D). I am facing north, so moving forward will put me on the goal. No obstacles or lava in that cell.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
